items.title: Climate-Chemistry Synergy Is Reversing Global Urban-Rural Ozone Differences.

items.abstract_snippet: Health-damaging surface ozone tends to be lower in populated urban areas than in the surroundings, yet this urban-rural difference is narrowing. While evidence from observations have attributed this narrowing to the reduced inhibition effect of urban nitrogen …

items.title: From molecular mechanisms to digital surveillance: the 2010-2025 evolution of benzodiazepine and Z-drug misuse research.
items.authors: Jianxi Liu, Weitao Zhu, Zilong Zhang, Quan Zhao, Yinglin Wang
items.abstract_snippet: The misuse of benzodiazepines (BZDs) and Z-drugs poses significant global public health challenges. This study maps the scientific evolution and paradigm shifts in this field from 2010 to 2025. A bibliometric analysis of 6,311 publications from the Web of Scie…
